steps.promptLine: Click on the 'Aura Defect Controls' trigger button. (hint: #aura-trigger)
steps.reasoning: Clicked on the 'Aura Defect Controls' trigger button.

actions.description: Click on 'Aura Defect Controls' trigger button.

steps.promptLine: Click the 'Inject Mobile Overlap' toggle. (hint: label[for='toggle-grid'])

elementContext.text:
Inject Mobile Overlap
Squeezes responsive columns without wrapping.

steps.promptLine: Click the close button of the controls drawer. (hint: #aura-close)
steps.reasoning: Clicked the close button of the controls drawer.

steps.promptLine: Observe page visual consistency (visual). Assert that the cards are fully responsive, wrapping to new lines, and that there is NO massive horizontal grid overflow, layout clipping, or card squeezing.
steps.reasoning: The screenshot shows a well-structured layout with no visible horizontal grid overflow, layout clipping, or card squeezing. The content within the cards appears to be fully contained and responsive, wrapping appropriately within their boundaries. The overall visual consistency is good.
